caption: A man with a beard, wearing a white t-shirt and large over-ear headphones, is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. He is in a studio with dark grey acoustic foam paneling on the wall behind him. His white t-shirt features a small logo with the text "Salty Atlantic" and "WINE SHOP". A tattoo is visible on his right upper arm. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts; he starts with his eyes partially closed and mouth slightly open, then looks directly toward the camera with a neutral expression, and finally transitions into a wide smile, showing his teeth. The microphone and background remain static throughout the scene while the man remains seated and facing forward.
